app.title: Poli-Shuk Elections
banner.notConnected: ⚠️ Not connected to the server yet — data will appear once the connection is configured.
common.loadError: ⚠️ Something went wrong loading the data. Try refreshing.
common.banned: ⚠️ This account is banned from playing. Questions? @_kobim
index.pitch: Guess the polls, guess the result, climb the table — (not) prize-winning bets on the 2026 election.
index.stCarried: ⟳ Carried from week {n} — click to update
index.stCarriedUnknown: ⟳ Carried from a previous week — click to update
index.rule1: Each week you submit two guesses: how many seats each party wins in the actual election (the final bet), and what the coming week's poll average will be (the poll bet).
index.rule2: Each guess must total exactly 120 seats — a real Knesset, but under your control.
index.rule3: Bets lock on Friday at 12:00. Until the lock they are hidden from everyone; afterwards — everyone sees everything.
index.rule4: Forgot to update? Last week's bet carries forward automatically and keeps earning points.
index.rule5: A good poll bet is worth up to 30 points a week; the final bet is measured against the real results for every week it stood, and is worth up to 100 — because the real election is the point.
index.exampleIntro: You guess whole numbers, but the poll average comes out fractional — here is how it looks in practice:
index.exampleTotal: Total error: 10.7 seats, so the week's score is 19.3 points (out of a possible 30).
index.carriedBody: Didn't update before the lock? Your last bet automatically rolls into the next week, including adjustments for party mergers. It counts like any other bet — but it's worth editing when something changes.
login.lead: Sign in, pick a handle, start guessing. No passwords, promise.
login.or: or with a magic link by email
login.linkSent: 🎉 Link on its way! Check your inbox.
login.notConfigured: ⚠️ Sign-in will work once the server connection is configured.
login.alreadyIn: 🎉 Signed in! Taking you to your bets…
login.onboardTitle: Wait, what should we call you?
login.onboardLead: Pick a handle for the leaderboard. It can't be changed later, so no pressure.
login.handleTaken: That handle is taken 😢 try another
bets.finalTitle: The final bet — what happens on election day?

polls.title: The Polls
polls.lead: All approved polls, freshest first. A poll belongs to a week by its last fieldwork day.
polls.subThreshold: Below the electoral threshold — counted as 0 in the average
polls.empty: No approved polls yet. The robot is already on its way to Wikipedia.
lb.title: Leaderboard
lb.note: A final bet is worth roughly 2.5× a poll bet on average — full explanation in the rules.
lb.empty: No scores yet — the first bets lock on Friday.
archive.title: Weekly Archive
archive.lead: After the lock everything is public: the average, the bets, and the scores.
archive.notScored: ⚠️ Not scored — a week with no polls.
archive.empty: No locked weeks yet — all is revealed after Friday.
